Subjective: Patient reports pain at Right lower extremity wound site, rates 5/10.
Objective: Wound assessment performed. Arterial arterial Right lower extremity measures 1.1 cm x 2.2 cm x 0.6 cm.
  Wound bed: 70% slough, 30% granulation tissue. Periwound: erythematous.
  Drainage: moderate. Odor: none.
Assessment: Arterial arterial Right lower extremity — improving.
Plan: Foam dressing change daily. Debridement consult ordered.

*Envive Care Conference Review - V 4.0
Wound Status: Arterial to Right lower extremity / Measures 1.1 cm x 2.2 cm / Stage: N/A
Drainage present - serosanguineous, moderate. No odor noted. Treatment: Foam dressing change daily.
